name: HalupixDUO
comment: The HaluPix DUO is an advanced hybrid LED tile that seamlessly integrates lighting and video capabilities into a modular design. This dual-source unit offers high-power, long-throw white pixels alongside high-brightness video and strobe features, with full pixel-level control. This integration facilitates diverse and dynamic lighting setups, suitable for a variety of professional stage and TV applications.

revision.text: Rev 043 - Virtual dimmer added in Basic Sector mode
